content.full_text:
State of California

Memorandum

To      :   File (Third Floor)                                Date    :   Oct. 16, 1978


From    :   FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION                         271-78-290
            Bob Stern

Subject:    Section 86107(d)


        A lobbyist and a legislative official are buying
a piece of property together. Each is putting up the
same amount of money; each is receiving the same share.

        There is no reportable exchange.




RMS:nc

sections.question_synthetic: Whether a joint real property purchase between a lobbyist and a legislative official, with equal contributions and equal ownership shares, constitutes a reportable exchange under Section 86107(d).
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC concludes that when a lobbyist and legislative official purchase property together with equal financial contributions and equal ownership shares, no reportable exchange occurs under Section 86107(d).
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Informal memorandum format without traditional QUESTION/CONCLUSION headers. Document appears to be internal FPPC correspondence. RMS initials likely indicate author, with 'nc' possibly indicating 'no changes' or similar notation.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: Whether a joint real property purchase between a lobbyist and a legislative official, with equal contributions and equal ownership shares, constitutes a reportable exchange under Section 86107(d).

CONCLUSION: There is no reportable exchange.

Each is putting up the same amount of money; each is receiving the same share. There is no reportable exchange. RMS:nc
embedding.summary: An FPPC memorandum addressing whether a joint real property purchase between a lobbyist and legislative official with equal contributions and ownership shares creates a reportable exchange, concluding it does not.
